trait_description: Percentage of floral lip that was red-orange in early-season pre-treatment flowers
outcome_description: Average reproductive-organ-contact Bombus or Apis visits per hour
outcome_denominator_or_exposure: Mean visits in 15-minute surveys multiplied by four to obtain a 60-minute rate; complete-case n=81 individual plants
notes: Pre-treatment floral redness is an attraction-signal candidate. This is a treatment-adjusted observational trait-path estimate and not a causal trait-manipulation effect.

trait_description: Relative condensed tannin measure from early-season pre-treatment flowers
outcome_description: Average reproductive-organ-contact Bombus or Apis visits per hour
outcome_denominator_or_exposure: Mean visits in 15-minute surveys multiplied by four to obtain a 60-minute rate; complete-case n=81 individual plants
notes: Pre-treatment floral tannins are a chemical barrier candidate rather than a manipulated defense treatment. This is a treatment-adjusted observational trait-path estimate.

trait_description: Percentage of floral lip that was red-orange in early-season pre-treatment flowers
outcome_description: Average percent floral tissue missing due to natural florivory
outcome_denominator_or_exposure: Raw surveys measured percent florivory on individual flowers and total open chasmogamous flowers per plant survey; processed complete-case n=154 individual plants
notes: Natural florivory response excludes imposed supplemental florivory from the raw response definition. This is a treatment-adjusted observational trait-path estimate.
